response.justification: Despite strong general software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, Bogdan does not meet the role's mandatory requirements. He has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience at National Instruments (versus the required 5-10 years), no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and critically, no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain exposure. His career has focused on web platforms, mobile apps, and data infrastructure using modern languages like TypeScript and D.
strengths: Extensive software engineering fundamentals with experience across multiple languages, platforms, and architectural patterns
Excellent communication and teaching abilities, demonstrated through conference talks, workshops, and well-documented open-source projects
Proven CI/CD and DevOps expertise, having set up infrastructure at scale for multiple companies
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far below the mandatory 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; background heavily favors MongoDB and modern NoSQL databases over relational systems
Zero demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, fixed-income products, or financial services domain

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C++ experience (6 months vs 5-10 years required)
No capital markets or financial domain expertise
Strong overall engineering and communication fundamentals
